# agenthicc

> A state-driven Python agent runtime for software engineering: event-sourced
> kernel, configurable workflows, capability-gated tools, durable sessions,
> and a Rich Live terminal workspace.

## Current runtime

The primary entry point is `agenthicc.__main__:main`.

- `agenthicc` launches the Rich workspace and interactive `TUISession`.
- `agenthicc --headless` reads non-empty stdin lines and emits JSON-lines.
- `kernel.AppState` is frozen domain state reduced from `Event` objects.
- `tui.conversation_store.AppState` is a separate reactive presentation model.
- `workflows/` contains `WorkflowPlugin`, phase specs, generic runners, and the
  built-in code-plan workflow.
- `agents/`, `modes/`, `skills/`, `commands/`, and project plugin loaders provide
  extension points.
- `tools/` provides class-based tools, filesystem/git/exec integrations, MCP,
  capability metadata, approvals, path and network guards, and shared HTTP
  safety helpers.
- `memory/` provides session/project/global tiers, semantic search, compaction,
  conversation journaling, and durable idempotent tool replay support.

## Important symbols

| Symbol | Module | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `AppState` | `agenthicc.kernel` | Frozen kernel domain state |
| `Event` | `agenthicc.kernel` | Serialized domain event |
| `EventProcessor` | `agenthicc.kernel` | MPSC queue and reducer loop |
| `root_reducer` | `agenthicc.kernel` | Pure event-to-state reducer |
| `load_config` | `agenthicc.config` | TOML/env/CLI configuration loader |
| `PermissionChecker` | `agenthicc.security` | Ordered fail-closed policy evaluator |
| `MemoryRouter` | `agenthicc.memory` | Three-tier memory dispatcher |
| `Tool` / `ToolBase` | `agenthicc.tools` | Legacy and typed class-based contracts adapted to lauren-ai |
| `ToolExecutor` | `agenthicc.tools` | lauren-ai-backed callable/class tool dispatcher |
| `ToolResult` / `ToolResultEnvelope` | `agenthicc.tools` | Typed compatibility and adapter result envelopes |
| `ToolSandbox` / `WorkspaceView` | `agenthicc.tools` | Timeout, resource, network, and real-path boundaries |
| `ToolMetadata` / `ToolErrorKind` | `agenthicc.tools` | Generated catalog metadata and stable error taxonomy |
| `SearchWebTool` / `FetchPageTool` | `agenthicc.skills.web_search` | Native lauren-ai tools for Brave search and visible page-text extraction |
| `WorkflowPlugin` | `agenthicc.workflows` | Custom workflow definition |
| `Workspace` | `agenthicc.tui.workspace` | Rich Live UI root |
| `UnifiedInputSession` | `agenthicc.tui.input` | Lifetime input/raw-mode loop |

## Configuration

```toml
[execution]
provider = "anthropic"
model = "" # provider default when empty
max_parallel_tasks = 4
auto_compact = true

[memory]
project_memory_path = ".agenthicc/memory"

[security]
sandbox_mode = true
allowed_paths = ["/absolute/path/to/project"]
network_allow_list = []
```

Provider keys are `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, `OPENAI_API_KEY`, or no key for Ollama.
See `docs/guides/configuration.md` for precedence and the full settings model.

## Persistence

Session artifacts are under `~/.agenthicc/sessions/`: kernel JSONL, conversation
JSONL, and an fsync-backed conversation journal. Project memory/cache/trust
data lives under `.agenthicc/`; global memory defaults to
`~/.agenthicc/global.db`.

## Invariants

- Start `EventProcessor.run()` before `emit()` and await `drain()` before reading.
- `root_reducer` is pure and kernel `AppState` is frozen.
- Use `WorkspaceView` for filesystem paths and the shared HTTP client for tools.
- Child capability scopes can only restrict their parent.
- Durable tool results must be replay-safe across a transport retry or resume.

The repository does not currently contain `agenthicc.api`, `tui.app`,
`tui.transcript`, `tui.events`, or the historical lifecycle-hook executor. Do
not generate code against those paths. The documented improvement plan is
`prds/prd-138-repository-improvement-roadmap.md`.
